name: Transition (Dissolve)
description: Reproducible twin of create_transition in dissolve mode: two sources blended by a single Cross TOP with a 0..1 Progress knob (0 = source A, 1 = source B). Self-contained test sources (a blue constantTOP and a radial rampTOP) so it previews offline; swap them for selectTOPs pointing at your real A/B decks. For the wipe/slide/zoom/glitch_cut styles the orchestrator adds transform/composite/GLSL stages — this twin captures the core crossfade. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; live-cook-validated on TD 099 build 2025.32820.

nodes.name: sel_a
nodes.comment: Source A (placeholder blue) — swap for a selectTOP to your real deck A.

nodes.name: sel_b
nodes.comment: Source B (placeholder radial ramp) — swap for a selectTOP to your real deck B.

nodes.name: dissolve
nodes.comment: Crossfade: cross=0 shows A, cross=1 shows B.

preview_description: A blue field dissolving into a radial ramp under a single Progress fader — the classic A/B crossfade at the mid-point.
